# too-many-dice SDK

TypeScript SDK for integrating TooManyDices into your online game. Control a shared dice-rolling room from your game server: manage players, configure dice, trigger rolls, and push interactive UI forms to players' phones.

## Installation

```bash
npm install too-many-dice
```

## Quick Start

```ts
import { TooManyDicesRoom } from "too-many-dice";

const room = await TooManyDicesRoom.create({
  playerLimit: 4,
  diceConfig: [{ type: "d6" }, { type: "d6" }],
  callbacks: {
    onPlayerJoined: (player) => console.log(`${player.name} joined`),
    onResult: (results) => console.log("Roll results:", results),
  },
});

console.log("Room code:", room.roomCode); // Share with players

const results = await room.roll();
// [{ diceId: "0", value: 4, dieType: "d6" }, { diceId: "1", value: 2, dieType: "d6" }]

await room.destroy();
```

---

## TooManyDicesRoom

### `TooManyDicesRoom.create(options?): Promise<TooManyDicesRoom>`

Creates a new room with full owner privileges.

```ts
const room = await TooManyDicesRoom.create({
  playerLimit: 4,
  diceConfig: [{ id: "atk", type: "d20" }],
  swipeGesturesEnabled: false,
  callbacks: { onPlayerJoined, onPlayerLeft, onResult, onFormSubmit },
});
```

### Properties

| Property      | Type                   | Description                               |
| ------------- | ---------------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `roomCode`    | `string`               | Code players enter in the app to join     |
| `playerLimit` | `number \| null`       | Max players (null if not set)             |
| `players`     | `readonly TmdPlayer[]` | Currently connected players               |

---

### Dice

#### `room.setDices(diceConfig: DiceConfig[]): Promise<void>`

Reconfigure dice at any time.

```ts
await room.setDices([{ id: "strength", type: "d20" }, { id: "bonus", type: "d4" }]);
```

---

### Rolling

#### `room.roll(player?: TmdPlayer): Promise<DiceResult[]>`

Triggers a roll. Delegates physics to `player` (or first connected player if omitted). Resolves when dice settle. Times out after 30s. Throws if no players are connected.

```ts
const results = await room.roll();
const results = await room.roll(room.players[0]);
```

#### `room.waitForRoll(player: TmdPlayer, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<DiceResult[]>`

Waits for a specific player to manually roll (shake/tap in the app). Default timeout: 120,000ms.

```ts
const results = await room.waitForRoll(room.players[0]);
const results = await room.waitForRoll(room.players[0], 60000);
```

---

### Room Control

#### `room.closeAccess(): Promise<void>`
Prevents new players from joining. Existing players stay connected.

#### `room.openAccess(): Promise<void>`
Re-opens the room after `closeAccess()`.

#### `room.enableSwipeGestures(enabled: boolean): Promise<void>`
Controls whether players can swipe-throw individual dice.

#### `room.destroy(): Promise<void>`
Disconnects the WebSocket and cleans up all listeners. Safe to call multiple times.

---

### Submit Forms

Send forms with a submit button; receive answers via `onFormSubmit` callback.

```ts
import { TextForm, PickerForm, CheckboxForm } from "too-many-dice";

await room.sendSubmitForms([
  {
    formId: "character-setup",
    targetPlayer: room.players[0],
    fields: [
      new TextForm("name", "Character name", { placeholder: "Enter name", required: true }),
      new PickerForm("class", "Class", ["Warrior", "Mage", "Rogue"]),
      new CheckboxForm("veteran", "Veteran player?"),
    ],
    submitButton: { label: "Confirm" },
  },
]);
// answers delivered via callbacks.onFormSubmit: { name: "Elara", class: "Mage", veteran: true }

await room.clearSubmitForms(); // dismiss all forms
await room.setFormErrors("character-setup", room.players[0], ["Name too short"]); // show validation errors
```

#### `room.sendSubmitForms(groups: SubmitFormGroup[]): Promise<void>`
#### `room.clearSubmitForms(): Promise<void>`
#### `room.setFormErrors(formId: string, player: TmdPlayer, errors: string[]): Promise<void>`

---

### Callback Forms

React to live field changes and button clicks in real time.

```ts
import { SliderForm, DpadForm } from "too-many-dice";

const handle = await room.sendCallbackForm({
  targetPlayer: room.players[0],
  fields: [
    {
      field: new SliderForm("str", "Strength", 1, 20, 1),
      onChange: (value) => console.log("Strength:", value),
    },
  ],
  buttons: [
    { label: "Confirm", onClick: (playerId) => { handle.clear(); } },
  ],
});

await handle.clear(); // dismiss manually
```

#### `room.sendCallbackForm(options: CallbackFormOptions): Promise<CallbackFormHandle>`

---

## Types

```ts
type DieType = "d4" | "d6" | "d8" | "d10" | "d12" | "d20";

interface DiceConfig {
  type: DieType;
  id?: string; // optional, returned in roll results
}

interface DiceResult {
  diceId: string;
  value: number;
  dieType: DieType;
}

interface CreateRoomOptions {
  diceConfig?: DiceConfig[];
  playerLimit?: number;
  swipeGesturesEnabled?: boolean; // default: true
  callbacks?: TooManyDicesCallbacks;
}

type TooManyDicesCallbacks = {
  onPlayerJoined?: (player: TmdPlayer) => void;
  onPlayerLeft?: (player: TmdPlayer) => void;
  onResult?: (results: DiceResult[]) => void;
  onFormSubmit?: (data: { formId: string; playerId: string; answers: Record<string, unknown> }) => void;
};

interface SubmitFormGroup {
  formId: string;
  targetPlayer: TmdPlayer;
  fields: TmdForm[];
  submitButton: { label: string };
}

interface CallbackFormOptions {
  targetPlayer: TmdPlayer;
  fields: CallbackField[];   // { field: TmdForm; onChange: (value: unknown) => void }
  buttons?: CallbackButton[]; // { label: string; onClick: (playerId: string) => void }
}

interface CallbackFormHandle {
  formId: string;
  clear: () => Promise<void>;
}

type DpadVisibility = "enabled" | "disabled" | "hidden";
```

---

## TmdPlayer

| Property   | Type     | Description                       |
| ---------- | -------- | --------------------------------- |
| `playerId` | `string` | Unique identifier for this player |
| `name`     | `string` | Display name chosen by the player |

---

## Form Field Classes

All fields: `new FieldClass(id, label, ...args, options?)`
Common options: `{ required?: boolean }`

| Class             | Constructor                                      | Submit value  |
| ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ------------- |
| `TextForm`        | `(id, label, { placeholder?, required? })`       | `string`      |
| `CheckboxForm`    | `(id, label, { required? })`                     | `boolean`     |
| `PickerForm`      | `(id, label, options: string[], { required? })`  | `string`      |
| `MultiSelectForm` | `(id, label, options: string[], { required? })`  | `string[]`    |
| `SliderForm`      | `(id, label, min, max, step, { required? })`     | `number`      |
| `DpadForm`        | `(id, label, { up?, down?, left?, right?, required? })` | `string` (direction) |

`DpadForm` direction config: `{ visibility?: "enabled" | "disabled" | "hidden" }`

---

## Complete Example: Turn-Based Game

```ts
import { TooManyDicesRoom, TextForm, PickerForm, SliderForm } from "too-many-dice";

async function runGame() {
  const characters = new Map<string, Record<string, unknown>>();

  const room = await TooManyDicesRoom.create({
    playerLimit: 2,
    callbacks: {
      onPlayerJoined: (p) => console.log(`${p.name} joined (${room.players.length}/2)`),
      onFormSubmit: ({ playerId, answers }) => characters.set(playerId, answers),
    },
  });

  console.log("Share this code:", room.roomCode);

  // Wait for 2 players
  await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (room.players.length === 2) { clearInterval(interval); resolve(); }
    }, 500);
  });

  await room.closeAccess();

  // Send character setup forms
  await room.sendSubmitForms(
    room.players.map((p) => ({
      formId: `char-${p.playerId}`,
      targetPlayer: p,
      fields: [
        new TextForm("name", "Character name", { required: true }),
        new PickerForm("class", "Class", ["Warrior", "Mage", "Rogue"]),
        new SliderForm("level", "Starting level", 1, 10, 1),
      ],
      submitButton: { label: "Ready!" },
    })),
  );

  // Wait for both submissions
  await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (characters.size === 2) { clearInterval(interval); resolve(); }
    }, 200);
  });
  await room.clearSubmitForms();

  // Play turns
  await room.setDices([{ id: "atk", type: "d20" }]);
  for (const player of room.players) {
    const results = await room.roll(player);
    console.log(`${player.name} rolled:`, results);
  }

  await room.destroy();
}

runGame().catch(console.error);
```
